name: Szechwan Sesame Flavored Noodles
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon Sesame oil, Szechwan pepper oil
recipeInstructions:
(For the hearty use up to 1 Tablespoon. Otherwise, use just a few drops.
Boil noodles al dente and drain in cold water. Heat a frying pan with the oil; add noodles and flatten out like a pancake. When the bottom becomes brown and slightly crisp, flip and fry the other side. Remove from pan and let cool. Place on a platter with garnish of chopped green onions. In a small bowl, combine sesame oil and hot oils with peanut butter a few drops at a time. Just before serving, pour the peanut butter sauce over the noodles. Enjoy.)
